compiled_state.title: RED: Write test for merge-state.sh worktree-to-session merge semantics
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write failing tests for merge-state.sh worktree-to-session merge handling:

1. test_worktree_to_session_merge_detected: Create a worktree, make changes, initiate merge into session branch. Assert merge-state.sh ms_is_merge_in_progress returns true.
2. test_worktree_only_files_includes_implementation: During worktree-to-session merge, assert ms_get_worktree_only_files returns the worktree implementation changes (NOT excludes them).
3. test_review_gate_skips_merge_commit: Assert review gate detects MERGE_HEAD during worktree-to-session merge and skips the merge commit.

### Test approach
Each test creates a real git repo + worktree, makes changes in the worktree, initiates a merge, and calls merge-state.sh functions to verify behavior.

### Files to modify
- tests/hooks/test-merge-state-worktree.sh (CREATE)

### TDD Requirement
Tests must FAIL against current merge-state.sh (no worktree-to-session handling).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/hooks/test-merge-state-worktree.sh
- [ ] Tests contain at least 3 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'echo.*---.*test_' tests/hooks/test-merge-state-worktree.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 3)}'
- [ ] .test-index maps merge-state.sh to this test
  Verify: grep -q 'merge-state' .test-index

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Tests confirmed RED ✓ — 5 failures across 3 tests. Missing: ms_is_worktree_to_session_merge (test 1), ms_get_incoming_only_files (tests 2 and 3). PASSED: 8 FAILED: 5
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Fixed: RED tests for merge-state worktree semantics (8 pass, 5 fail RED).
comments.author: Test
